name: spitting_end_with_pending_no_lift
description: PRZ_SPITTING_END with active=1 but lifted=0 (TOOLCHANGE skipped lift near Z max). Verifies that the Z-lower in the lifted-branch is gated properly: ORCA_PURGE fires + active is cleared, but no Z move happens. Mirrors the no-lift toolchange_near_z_max scenario.
